title: Enter Dokkoida!
overview: As Suzuo arrives in the city, he desperately needs a job, so he takes an offer: become a test subject

title: Purple Hair, How Hip Can Ya Get?
overview: Things aren't going so well, even with the recruitment ads they can't seem to get past the bad press.

title: Dokkoida vs. Edelweiss
overview: When the Umeki family moves into the compound, along with their daughter Ruri, a new threat arrives.

title: The Strange Neighbor, Sayuri
overview: With all the strange noises coming from the complex, one would think it was haunted!  It's no ghost! It's the new neighbor, Sayuri.

title: More Bang for My Buck: A Higher Allowance!
overview: Suzuo is barely making ends meet. He finds out that the villains are getting paid a higher compensation, Suzuo demands a raise.

title: Cycling Contest for a Day at the Pool
overview: A heat wave hits the city, and it's too hot to fight. A new complex has a fantastic pool, but the entry fee is expensive.

title: Kurika's Dream
overview: Summer is here, and everyone is planning to see the fireworks. Meanwhile, Kurika gets damaged and finally has a dream.

title: Little Sister Love
overview: After a new TV movie comes out, the neighbor's become a bit suspicious that something might be going on between Suzuo and Kosuzu.

title: Some Like It Hot
overview: A superstar goes missing, Marilyn Ronmoe and the GFP is tasked to find her. All of the sudden she ends up showing up at Suzuo's apartment.

title: Mogumokkuru's Makeover
overview: Chief Mogumokkuru launches a PR campaign to better the public sentiment of the GFP. Hilarities ensues as the Inspector decides on reality TV.

title: Cosmos House's Last Hour?
overview: Summer is over, The Dokkoida and Neruloid Girls teams are now out of work as the ultimate weapon for the GFP is complete.

title: The Battle of Zealousness
overview: Fighting together, not as villains and test subjects, they unite as Cosmo's house resident's to gain back their jobs.
